info.name: RAG Pipeline (Complete)
info.description:
All 8 retrieval endpoints tested against AIR_Log_Report_Merged.xlsx (10 real incidents: difficult intubation, bronchospasm, failed spinal, airway obstruction, brainstem anaesthesia, equipment failure, paediatric IV access).

Workflow:
1. Run 'Ingest Excel file' first — copy any incident_id from the response into the {{incident_id}} collection variable
2. Run the remaining requests in order

Note: Qdrant is in-memory — data clears on server restart. Always ingest before querying.

variable.description: Copy any incident_id from the 'Ingest Excel file' response

request.description:
Parse + embed + store all 10 incidents from the Excel file.

After the response arrives:
- Copy any incident_id from the 'incident_ids' array
- Paste it into the {{incident_id}} collection variable (Edit Collection > Variables)
Verify all 10 incidents are stored. Expect: points_count=10, status=green, embedding_dimension=1024
Semantic search — no filters. Expect top results from incidents 1 (Cormack-Lehane IIb / bougie), 5 (RSI emergency laparotomy), 9 (morbidly obese video laryngoscopy).
Should return the laparoscopic cholecystectomy bronchospasm incident (41-50 Female, peritoneal insufflation trigger) and the gynaecology DHC bronchospasm + equipment fault incident.
Should return the ACL reconstruction incident (31-40 Male, spinal L3-L4, inadequate block → GA conversion, outcome D1).

item.name: STEP 4 — Search with surgery type filter (General surgery)

request.description:
Filtered to General surgery only. Expect results from: laparoscopic cholecystectomy (bronchospasm), exploratory laparotomy (RSI/difficult intubation), bariatric sleeve gastrectomy (difficult airway).

Check: filters_applied=true in the response.

Vector similarity lookup using a stored incident's embedding (no re-embedding needed).

Prerequisite: set the {{incident_id}} variable to any ID from the ingest response.

Expect: ranked list of the 5 most similar incidents with cosine scores.

RAG retrieval — returns formatted context_text block ready for LLM injection.

Should surface the ophthalmology cataract incident (61-70 Female, peribulbar block → brainstem anaesthesia, LMA rescue, ventilatory support, outcome D2).

Check: context_text contains incident narrative blocks.

HDBSCAN + UMAP clustering across all 10 incidents.

Using min_cluster_size=2 (lower than default 3) because the dataset is small.

Expected clusters (approximate):
- Airway/Difficult intubation group (incidents 1, 5, 9)
- Bronchospasm/Respiratory group (incidents 3, 4)
- Regional block complication group (incidents 6, 7)

Check: n_clusters > 0. If 0, the 10-incident dataset may be too small for HDBSCAN — use themes.summary_report for pattern narrative.

Week 8 endpoint. Preprocesses the query, expands clinical terms, builds an evidence bundle with relevance grading.

Expect:
- intent: 'general'
- keywords: ['airway', 'complications', 'difficult', 'intubation', 'anaesthesia', 'induction']
- expanded_terms: includes 'anesthesia', 'anaesthetic'
- suggested_filters: null (no severity/year in query)
- confidence: 'High' or 'Moderate'
- citations: one line per result e.g. 'Incident abc123 | severity=... | type=... | score=0.891'
- grounded_context: full evidence block with HIGH/MODERATE/LOW grade labels

item.name: STEP 8b — Grounded RAG: root cause intent

request.description:
Triggered by 'why' — intent should be 'root_cause'.

Expect:
- intent: 'root_cause'
- keywords: ['bronchospasm', 'laparoscopic', 'surgery', 'general', 'anaesthesia']
- expanded_terms: includes 'anesthesia', 'bronchospasm'
- suggested_filters: null (no severity word in query)
- Should return the laparoscopic cholecystectomy incident (peritoneal insufflation trigger) and the gynaecology DHC incident

item.name: STEP 8c — Grounded RAG: pattern analysis intent

request.description:
Triggered by 'recurring patterns' — intent should be 'pattern_analysis'.

Expect:
- intent: 'pattern_analysis'
- keywords: includes 'emergency', 'difficult', 'intubation'
- Should surface: incident 1 (Cormack-Lehane IIb emergency), incident 5 (RSI emergency laparotomy), incident 9 (morbidly obese video laryngoscopy)

item.name: STEP 8d — Grounded RAG: safety recommendations intent

request.description:
Triggered by 'prevent' + 'safety' — intent should be 'safety_recommendations'.

Expect:
- intent: 'safety_recommendations'
- keywords: includes 'spinal', 'regional', 'anaesthesia', 'safety'
- expanded_terms: includes 'anesthesia', 'anaesthetic'
- Should return: incident 7 (failed spinal ACL reconstruction), incident 6 (brainstem anaesthesia after peribulbar block)

use_preprocessing=false skips filter inference and keyword expansion — raw semantic search only.

Expect:
- suggested_filters: null (even though 'difficult' is in query)
- coverage_score: 1.0 (no keywords = full coverage by default)
- Should still return relevant results (incident 8: 2-year-old inguinal hernia, sevoflurane induction, IO line) via pure vector similarity

Compare results with STEP 8a to see the effect of preprocessing.
